scarcities.news_query: merchant power IPP electricity demand data center
scarcities.thesis: The purest slow-to-build scarcity; can't permit/build fast. Turbines are sold out because electrons are binding.

scarcities.news_query: large power transformer shortage lead time
scarcities.thesis: 128-144wk lead times, ~30% fleet shortfall. No technical substitute. Eases ~2027-29 as plants ramp.

scarcities.news_query: gas turbine backlog GE Vernova Siemens Energy
scarcities.thesis: 3-OEM oligopoly sold out into 2029-30. Backlog = visibility through the digestion. Deposits partly cancellable.

scarcities.news_query: electrician labor shortage data center construction EPC
scarcities.thesis: 45-70% of DC construction cost; 'the #1 problem' (Microsoft). Can't be factory-expanded or imported.

scarcities.news_query: HVDC high voltage cable subsea supply
scarcities.thesis: >5yr waitlists, cable-laying vessel constrained. Eases ~2027-30.

scarcities.news_query: uranium enrichment HALEU Centrus SWU
scarcities.thesis: Hard Russian-LEU ban Jan 2028; HALEU near-monopoly could gate SMR rollout. The cleanest AI-power materials derivative.

scarcities.news_query: uranium price supply deficit utilities contracting
scarcities.thesis: Structural deficit; LT ~$90/lb. But spot round-tripping; crowded trade.

scarcities.news_query: copper supply deficit mine grade
scarcities.thesis: ~30% supply deficit by 2035; slowest/most certain. Has genuine non-AI demand (a partial de-correlator).

scarcities.news_query: rare earth magnet China export control NdPr dysprosium
scarcities.thesis: China ~90% separation/magnets; weaponized. Decadal moat. But subsidy-floor trade; 'short the China peace'. Catalyst: Jan 2027 defense ban; Nov 2026 suspension lapse.

scarcities.news_query: gallium germanium China export control GaN
scarcities.thesis: No RF substitute, byproduct inelasticity, domestic caps 10-15% by 2030. Harder than magnets BUT cleanest proxy (WOLF) is impaired (chokepoint != rent).

scarcities.news_query: graphite anode battery China export
scarcities.thesis: China >90% battery-grade anode; suspended to Nov 2026.

scarcities.news_query: HBM high bandwidth memory shortage Micron pricing
scarcities.thesis: MU ~10-12x FORWARD, HBM sold out for 2026. Cheap-but-cyclical; 3 suppliers adding ~50% capacity.

scarcities.news_query: CoWoS advanced packaging TSMC capacity
scarcities.thesis: CoWoS un-binding by construction (+3.7x + OSAT). SoIC binds 2027-29; glass interposer 2028-29.

scarcities.news_query: ASML EUV lithography orders bookings
scarcities.thesis: The actual chokepoint; High-NA limited production 2027-28.

scarcities.news_query: optical transceiver co-packaged optics 1.6T demand
scarcities.thesis: Already ran ~5x. CPO leg weakest (LPO substitution). Copper hits wall 2028-30.

scarcities.news_query: ABF substrate EUV photoresist shortage
scarcities.thesis: Ajinomoto ABF monopoly; Japan ~90% EUV photoresist. Geopolitically fragile; spikes 2026-27.

scarcities.news_query: data center liquid cooling CDU shortage
scarcities.thesis: The literal 2026 deployment throttle (secured power+contract, still can't deploy without cooling). Relievable with capex.

scarcities.news_query: humanoid robot manipulation training data foundation model
scarcities.thesis: The demo->deployment gate; no internet of physical interactions. Compounding fleet moat. Mostly private.

scarcities.news_query: harmonic drive precision reducer robot actuator
scarcities.thesis: Binds 2026-29 but ERODING moat (Schaeffler integrated actuators + China entrants). Don't conflate binds with durable.

scarcities.news_query: space solar cell gallium arsenide satellite power
scarcities.thesis: Space-cell output single-digit MW/yr; ~98% gallium behind Chinese valve.

scarcities.news_query: orbital data center radiator thermal space compute
scarcities.thesis: Physics floor (~100-350 W/m2). The TRUE binding constraint on orbital compute, not launch cost. Short-the-hype on orbital DCs.

scarcities.news_query: dilution refrigerator helium-3 quantum cryogenics
scarcities.thesis: He-3 physics-fixed supply (tritium decay). Fridge oligopoly. But quantum may stay commercially marginal through ~2030.

scarcities.news_query: AI drug discovery proprietary biology data GMP capacity
scarcities.thesis: Bet the bottleneck (data, GMP, delivery IP, regulatory time), not the molecule. Tools = picks-and-shovels. NOTE: Street already re-rating tools UP (late).

scarcities.news_query: reinforcement learning environments agentic training data
scarcities.thesis: Public text (~300T tokens) exhausting 2026-2032. Largely private; public proxies thin.
